data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Channel-aware delivery/reply status', but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for channel-aware delivery/reply status, yet the prior steps do not include any checks or validations related to this specific requirement. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence needed to confirm the requirement's coverage.
gaps: No evidence of channel-aware delivery/reply status validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the channel-aware delivery/reply status requirement.
